title: Unused module-level get_db() function
evidence: app.py:8-13 defines get_db() and DATABASE (line 5), but create_app() uses its own _get_db() closure (line 53); the module-level function is never called
suggestion: Remove the dead get_db() function and the module-level DATABASE constant (keep it inside create_app only)

title: No type hints on function signatures
evidence: app.py: create_app(), row_to_book(), init_db() etc. lack type annotations; test_app.py similarly untyped
suggestion: Add type hints for better IDE support and static analysis (e.g. def create_app(db_path: str | None = None) -> Flask)
